text: ファイン
あっ、うわさの新入りさんね。

あたしはファイン。
この町で戦闘の訓練教官をしているの。よろしくね！

どう、この町は？
みんないいヒトばかりだから、すぐに馴染めると思うわ。

ところで……ここ最近、
この浜辺にエネミーがよく出るのよね。

おかげでみんな、
ゆっくり釣りもできなくて。

でね、そこでお願いなんだけど、
訓練がてらにエネミーを倒してみない？

エネミーとの実戦をとおして、
いろいろな攻撃方法を教えてあげるわ。
ナイスファイトだったわ！

また、いつでも指導してあげるからね。
期待してるわ。
Figne
Ah, you must be the rumored newbie.

I'm Figne. I handle the combat training here in town.
It's good to finally meet you.

How you finding the town?
Everyone here's real nice. I'm sure you'll be settled in in no time.

Don't know if you've heard, but enemies have been
turning up on this beach a lot recently.
As a result, no one has been able to take it easy and fish here.
So, I have a request. Could you take out the enemies? It can double up as training.

I'll teach you about all sorts of ways to attack, and you can test them out on some
live targets.
Those were some nice moves!
I see a lot of potential in you. Come back anytime you fancy another lesson.
